summary: The provided evidence does not support the claim that overweight children necessarily grow up to be overweight adults; instead, it highlights associations between early-life developmental issues and adverse health outcomes unrelated to long-term body mass trajectory. No data link childhood overweight directly or inherently to adult overweight status.
